texto: I know not by what methods rare But this I know: God answers prayer. I know not if the blessing sought Will come in just the guise I thought. I leave my prayer to Him alone Whose will is wiser than my own.
explicacao: Citação de Eliza M. Hickok sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “I know not by what methods rare But this I know: God answers prayer. I know not if the blessing s…” articula reflexao, prayer, methods em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
